text.message: Red you going wood or ore?
Anybody steal reds road I’ll give ya three nbs in a row
You mean get you the plow?
I mean I had road here first
I think I only have 1 choice
I dont think there's a way out of this blue
I think I gotta take the 8/3/port
Red I asked what u are doing I would have picked differently
Good thing the only resource you dont product you can get traded to you
Don’t trade oj ore port to quick
yeah, or else I might 2:1 every resource
need to keep army and road off red
if u arent 3v1ing here we lose OJ
No but I trade ore for wood
one of u needs to dev
I can trade ore for brick
idk about that u are getting road and army soon lol
How do u assume I hold that?
oj needed to ask for a road
I need the production, that's final
ur setup is army and vps or lose
if its knight vp they win
takes 9510 83 and goes for double city
I'd rather a city over 1 dev
Alright, I'll break the sad news to you guys
Don’t think it’s possible for me to win in time
Black takes road from me and I’m out
not if blue drops a road
not on their turn on yours
ur deciding winner without more value
unless oj has mono we lose
I've got some bad news for you
u needed more value there blue
dont be road bxc for free
